description: 5-slide product update deck for Gyan — what shipped in the last 2 months (Jan–Mar 2026)

slides.title: Indexer Migration & API Modernisation
slides.body:
• Completed 8-phase migration of all DAPI routes from The Graph to Postgres indexer (PRD-6170 to PRD-6177), covering token core, stats, system activity, user domain, and addons
• Migrated M4 compliance layer: identity, claim, trusted issuer, topic, and compliance module routes now served from indexer (PRD-6669–6674)
• v2 API hardened with full filtering, sorting, and pagination across all collection endpoints (PRD-6582, PRD-6583)
• All v2 routes aligned to JSON:API URL structure for consistency (PRD-6581)
• Durable worker application created to support background job reliability (PRD-6264)
• End-to-end system stats test coverage added to DAPI test suite (PRD-5070)

slides.title: Smart Contract Security & Account Abstraction
slides.body:
• Resolved 13 account-abstraction security findings from static analysis (Slither) including high-severity controlled-delegatecall issue (PRD-6600–6613)
• Fixed high-severity multisig signer privilege escalation in identity claim management (PRD-6613)
• Remediated medium-severity compliance module findings: TimeLock DoS, TokenSupplyLimit tracker, TransferApproval authority overwrite (PRD-6449–6455)
• System V4 implementation shipped with directory keys and MIGRATION_ROLE support (PRD-6514, PRD-6513, PRD-6516)
• Ported SMARTMultisigWeightedValidator and SMARTPaymasterSigner as org addons with Ignition modules (PRD-6402, PRD-6403)
• ISMARTV2 interface with ERC165 detection added to smart-core (PRD-6517)
